title: Dorry and Brogy’s Endless Duel
main_description: The giants’ proud battle becomes the center of the island as the Straw Hats learn what Elbaf honor means. The reviewed chapter file is organized into display-ready story parts with cleaned dialogue and context-based speaker names.
key_events: The Straw Hats Watch the Giants
Dorry and Brogy’s Endless Duel — Part 6
